hooks.command: if tmux list-sessions >/dev/null 2>&1; then for v in AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK ANTHROPIC_MODEL ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS DISABLE_TELEMETRY DO_NOT_TRACK CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_TELEMETRY CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC STATSIG_DISABLED; do val=$(printenv "$v" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$val" ]; then tmux set-environment -g "$v" "$val" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; done; fi

read -r INPUT; CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | sed 's/.*"command": *"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\bgit\s+push\b'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"git push is blocked by overstory — merge locally, push manually when ready"}'; exit 0; fi;
read -r INPUT; TOOL_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | sed 's/.*"tool_name": *"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/'); ov log tool-start --agent orchestrator --tool-name "$TOOL_NAME"
read -r INPUT; TOOL_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | sed 's/.*"tool_name": *"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/'); ov log tool-end --agent orchestrator --tool-name "$TOOL_NAME"
read -r INPUT; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then mulch diff HEAD~1 2>/dev/null || true; fi
